title: grammitis flexibilis
intro: Grammitis flexibilis, also known as flexible lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory problems, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Grammitis flexibilis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infuser, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization of its health benefits.
